case_title: DUSTIN K. HENDERSON VS. BIOMATRIX INC. DBA BIOMATRIX INTERNATIONAL

POS OF MEMO OF LAW AND POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN OPPOS. TO DEFT'S MTN TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS TO DISMISS AND/OR STRIKE COMPLAINT AND DEC FILED BY PLAINTIFF HENDERSON, DUSTIN K.
DECLARATION OF (SUPPLEMENTAL) GUY MILLER IN SUPPORT OF MTN TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS TO DISMISS AND/STRIKE COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT BIOMATRIX, INC.
MINI MINUTES FOR JUL-31-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING - DEFENDANT BIOMATRIX, INC.'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS IS CONTINUED TO AUGUST 14, 2012. JUDGE: CURTIS KARNOW, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR # 5976

LAW AND MOTION, 302, THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT BIOMATRIX, INC.'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS; TO DISMISS AND/OR STRIKE COMPLAINT FOR LACK OF JURISDICTION, AND PRECLUSION OF LAW PROVISION IS DENIED. THE PORTION OF THE RUTTER GROUP CITED BY DEFENDANT, WHEN READ IN CONTEXT, DOES NOT STAND FOR THE PROPOSITION THAT A CHOICE-OF-LAW CLAUSE IS THE SAME THING AS A FORUM-SELECTION CLAUSE AND THERE IS NO LEGAL AUTHORITY FOR THIS POSITION. THERE IS NO FORUM-SELECTION CLAUSE BETWEEN THE PARTIES. PLAINTIFF HAS PRESENTED EVIDENCE SUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH SPECIFIC PERSONAL JURISDICTION OVER DEFENDANT. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A MORE SPECIFIC FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR # 5976
ORDER DENYING DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS; TO DISMISS AND OR STRIKE COMPLAINT FOR LACK OF JURISDICTION (COPY OF ORDER IN DEPT. 301 OUTBOX)
MINI MINUTES FOR AUG-14-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-16-2012 Off Calendar

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Aug-14-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Sunena Sabharwal, Esq. of Sabharwal Law Offices, Tel. 510.665.8777, for Defendant and moving party;
Matthew C. Helland, Esq. of Nichols Kaster, Tel. 415.277.7239, for Plaintiff and opposing party.

The matter was argued. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT BIOMATRIX, INC.'s MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS; TO DISMISS AND/OR STRIKE COMPLAINT FOR LACK OF JURISDICTION, AND PRECLUSION OF LAW PROVISION is Denied. The portion of the Rutter Group cited by Defendant, when read in context, does not stand for the proposition that a choice-of-law clause is the same thing as a forum-selection clause and there is no legal authority for this position. There is no forum-selection clause between the parties. Plaintiff has presented evidence sufficient to establish specific personal jurisdiction over Defendant. (Prevailing party to prepare a more specific form of order.) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Jul-31-2012 Continued To Aug-14-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. MATTHEW HELLAND, TEL. NO. 277-7235 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. SUNENA SABHARWAL, TEL. NO. (510) 665-8777 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - DEFENDANT BIOMATRIX, INC.'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS IS CONTINUED TO AUGUST 14, 2012. Judge: Curtis Karnow, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976 =(302/CK)
